Finding ID: SEC-001
Specialist: Security Auditor
Severity: Critical
Confidence: High
File: src/auth/login.py
Lines: 10-20
Title: SQL injection in user search endpoint
Evidence: The search_users function at line 15 concatenates user input directly.
Impact chain: Attacker sends crafted input → SQL injection → database compromise
Recommended fix: Use parameterized queries.

Finding ID: SEC-002
Specialist: Security Auditor
Severity: Important
Confidence: Medium
File: src/auth/login.py
Lines: 80-90
Title: Missing input validation
Evidence: The input handler on line 85 accepts arbitrary data without validation.
Impact chain: Malformed input accepted → unexpected state → application crash or exploit
Recommended fix: Add input validation.
